detail.description:
The Era of Transcendence Begins!

Update: ‘Transcendence,’ a new growth system that pushes beyond limits!

Meet the Transcendence Heroes, who have surpassed the Ultimate Descent, and experience even more powerful battles right now.

=====================================================

■ Transcendence Hero Update

A new growth beyond the ultimate realm—Transcendence Heroes have arrived!

■ Deeper Fun in Growth

Train your heroes to become even stronger and complete your battles with your own un
